channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: India has long promised 'vibrant' border villages, as China speedily builds up
item.description: India's government launched a Vibrant Villages Programme almost four years ago. But as China steadily builds up its side, Indian residents wonder what...

item.title: A Holiday High-School Game Is Shattered by a Fatal Assault
item.description: At a hockey rink in Pawtucket, R.I., shots rang out, leaving two people dead, in addition to the shooter. The police chief said it was a family matter...

item.title: Longtime civil rights leader the Rev. Jesse Jackson dies at 84
item.description: The Rev. Jesse Jackson was a lifelong civil rights advocate until his death Tuesday at the age of 84.

item.title: U.S. and Iran Make ‘Good Progress’ in Geneva Talks, Foreign Minister Says
item.description: President Trump has called on Iran to reach an immediate accord or else face the threat of a possible U.S. attack.

item.title: Iranians Defy Government Crackdown at Memorials for Slain Protesters
item.description: Authorities moved to suppress shows of defiance at ceremonies commemorating 40 days since the death of protesters.

item.title: New Sign at Bridge to Canada Aims to Keep Immigrant Drivers Out of Trap
item.description: The recent detention of a visiting research scientist has renewed attention on a confusing exit ramp in Buffalo that sends drivers across the border.

item.title: The record-breaking cocaine boom — and its deadly fallout
item.description: Cocaine has made a roaring comeback, and it's having some big negative effects in the U.S. and around the world.

item.title: Jesse Jackson, Charismatic Champion of Civil Rights, Dies at 84
item.description: An impassioned orator, he was a moral and political force, forming a “rainbow coalition” of poor and working-class people and seeking the presidency. ...

item.title: Immigration crackdown in Maine is a top issue in battle for key Senate seat
item.description: President Trump's immigration policy is complicating Republicans' attempts to maintain control of Congress. A recent crackdown in Maine, for instance,...

item.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson has died. And, U.S. and Iran set for high-stakes nuclear talks
item.description: Longtime civil rights leader Rev. Jesse Jackson dies at age 84. And, the U.S. and Iran are set for high-stakes negotiations today in Geneva about Iran...

item.title: U.S. and Iran’s High-Stakes Nuclear Talks Set to Kick Off
item.description: The U.S. and Iran have been flexing their military might as negotiators from the two countries resume nuclear talks in Switzerland.

item.title: U.S. and Iran Make ‘Good Progress’ in Geneva Talks, Foreign Minister Says
item.description: President Trump has called on Iran to reach an immediate accord or else face the threat of a possible U.S. attack.

item.title: Japan Wins Pairs Figure Skating, Knocking China From the Top
item.description: Riku Miura and Ryuichi Kihara of Japan emerged with the gold medal with a flawless, high-scoring performance after Monday’s free skate.

item.title: Ukraine and Russia Hold New Round of Peace Talks, but Expectations Are Low
item.description: Both sides described previous U.S.-mediated negotiations as productive, although they did not appear to address sticking points like territory and sec...

item.title: In Iran, Slain Protesters’ Memorials Will Test State Crackdown
item.description: Ceremonies commemorating the 40 days after protesters were killed are planned this week, challenging the authorities’ ability to restrain them.
